videos.video_subject: How Neymar fractured a vertebra at the 2014 World Cup and was just centimeters away from a career-ending, life-changing spinal injury
videos.video_script: At the 2014 World Cup, Neymar fractured his back. Doctors said two centimeters higher and he'd never walk again. He was carried off in tears. That close to the end. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Neymar Brazil goal celebration, Neymar PSG celebration, Neymar dribbling past defenders, Neymar injured 2014 World Cup, Neymar carried off stretcher, Neymar emotional crying, Neymar free kick celebration, Neymar samba skill move, Neymar close up face, Neymar Brazil yellow jersey
